name: evidence aggregator output declares the evidence_count and organizations_count fields per pattern for downstream provenance
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p6","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"org":"a","tier":1},{"number":2,"org":"b","tier":1},{"number":3,"org":"c","tier":1}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/aggregate-evidence.sh" --pattern pat.json --emit-fields 2>out.txt && grep -q '"evidence_count":3' out.txt && grep -q '"organizations_count":3' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
